name: nelson
description: Codex-native package scaffold for converting the Nelson plugin into Codex primitives.

interface.shortDescription: Codex conversion package scaffold for Nelson.
interface.longDescription: This plugin package is the Codex-native boundary for the Nelson conversion effort. It groups workflows, hooks, skills, rules, and assets so the source plugin can be mapped into Codex primitives and validated mission by mission.
defaultPrompt: Inventory Nelson workflows and map them into Codex primitives.
Resolve Nelson commands dynamically when the prompt asks for package context or validation.
Package the Nelson conversion boundary for Codex.
Validate mission scenarios for the converted plugin.
